---
title: "tutorial_v100"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{tutorial_v100}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

## Load libraries and set directory
```{r lib, echo=TRUE, results=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
library(HiVE)
# Set working directory
getwd()
setwd("/home/ncsteven/analyze/1_packages")
```

## Connect to database and retrieve edges and nodes
```{r lib, echo=TRUE, results=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
# Connect to HiVE database
db1 <- DBI::dbConnect(RSQLite::SQLite(), "HiVE/HiVE.db")
```
